data.description: Federal Reserve Board invites public comment on proposal that would allow U.S. banks and credit unions to use intermediaries to transfer funds through the FedNow Service

data.title: KushoAI Unveils APIEval-20 to Benchmark AI Agents in API Testing
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that authentication failures are responsible for causing 34% of API outages. To address this issue, a new benchmark called APIEval-20 has been introduced specifically designed for APIs that evolve faster than they are documented. Since its public release, APIEval-20 has garnered over 100 downloads within its first week. This information was shared by KushoAI, an AI-native platform based in San Francisco. The platform aims to tackle the challenges associated with rapidly changing APIs.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Dispensing Device for Marking Paint (PTA-473)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 8, 2026, an inventor from Puyallup, Washington, shared the inspiration behind creating QUICK SPRAY, a device that allows for the easy installation of a can of survey marking spray paint onto a GPS rover rod. The inventor believed there needed to be a more straightforward method for dispensing marking paint at different locations. This innovative solution aims to simplify the process for users and streamline workflows.

data.title: Reply selected by Microsoft as Launch Partner for Agent 365, supporting the governance and scaling of AI agents
data.description: In Chicago on April 8, 2026, Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] was announced as one of the select Launch Partners for Agent 365. This partnership aims to support the widespread release of Microsoft's innovative platform, which focuses on delivering top-tier governance, observability, and lifecycle management for enterprises.

data.title: Madrid's Wood Weave Brings Beauty and Dimension to Commercial Interiors
data.description: On April 8, 2026, in Oceanside, California, Madrid, a brand under Catalyst Acoustics Group, showcased Wood Weave - a unique real wood vertical surfacing solution. This product, designed to elevate commercial interiors, is known for its high quality and hand-crafted nature. The innovation aims to enhance interior aesthetics with a focus on acoustic performance.

data.title: Largest Clinical Study of XyliMelts® Shows Significant Relief for Dry Mouth While Sleeping
data.description: A recently conducted peer-reviewed study led by Dr. Elmar Ludwig is set to be published in Clinical Oral Investigations in ULM, Germany on April 6, 2026. The study involves the largest sample of XyliMelts® users to date, providing important clinical data. The results show notable benefits for patients dealing with radiation-induced issues.

data.title: Harvey AI now caters to VC and startup lawyers, offering 10 hours saved per week. #LegalTech #Automation
data.description: The legal automation platform by Harvey AI has been extended to cater to venture capital and emerging company lawyers, offering a potential time-saving of 10 hours per attorney each week. This expansion aims to enhance efficiency and productivity for legal professionals in these sectors.

data.title: Apple's Foldable iPhone Still Set For Fall Launch, Analysts Say
data.description: Analysts reported that Apple's speculated foldable iPhone is on track for a release in the autumn. This news resulted in a boost in Apple's stock on Wednesday. The post about Apple's Foldable iPhone's Fall Launch was featured on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Robinhood Stock Outlook Divides Analysts, Cathie Wood Makes $12.7 Mil Buy
data.description: Investment experts are divided on the future performance of Robinhood stock as the company prepares for earnings season. Notably, ARK Invest, led by Cathie Wood, recently acquired $12.7 million worth of shares in the company. The opinions on Robinhood's stock outlook vary among analysts, with some expressing uncertainty while others are more optimistic about its potential. Wood's significant investment in the company indicates confidence in its trajectory.

data.title: Tesla Releases 'Sentient' FSD 14.3. The Stock Pared Earlier Gains.
data.description: On Tuesday night, Tesla launched the latest iteration of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software, dubbed 'Sentient' FSD 14.3. Following this release, the company's shares experienced a bump after reaching a seven-month low, though they did not keep pace with the overall rise in the stock market, particularly due to the ceasefire situation in Iran. The new FSD software version generated investor excitement, however, the stock's gains were trimmed later on.

data.title: Strategy's New Product Grew Faster Than The iPhone And Google Ads Combined
data.description: The Stretch preferred stock by Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) experienced remarkable growth, reaching $5 billion in just seven months, outpacing the revenue milestones of Apple's iPhone and Google Ads. This unique product offers an 11.5% yield that is tax-deferred, and boasts an 80% retail participation rate. Launched in July 2025 as part of the Seven-Month Sprint Strategy, Stretch hit the $5 billion mark by mid-March 2026. By comparison, it took Apple's iPhone about a year and Google Ads about four years to achieve the same revenue milestone. According to Strategy CEO Fong Lee, Stretch could be considered the fastest-growing product in history. In the realm of ETFs, the gold ETF took four to five years to reach $5 billion in assets under management, while the Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) ETF took close to a year. Interestingly, the growth trajectory of Stretch surpasses these benchmarks, making it a standout success story.

data.title: The FIFA World Cup 2026™ Trophy Tour by Coca-Cola
data.description: The upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026™ Trophy Tour by Coca-Cola will showcase the prestigious FIFA World Cup Trophy in St. Louis, Missouri. Coca-Cola, a renowned partner of FIFA, will offer fans worldwide the exclusive chance to view the original FIFA World Cup Trophy, the ultimate prize in soccer. This event precedes the much-awaited FIFA World Cup 2026™. The tour aims to provide an up-close experience with the iconic trophy before the tournament. Millions of fans globally are expected to participate in this unique opportunity.
